aboleth.alt: A huge blue-gray aboleth with three eyes and four tentacles glides through a dark underwater cavern.

animated-armor.alt: An empty dark-steel suit of animated plate armor advances through a castle corridor with raised fists.

awakened-shrub.alt: A small awakened shrub scuttles across a woodland floor on tangled roots with thorny branches raised.

bandit.alt: A small hooded bandit waits beside a lonely road with scimitar drawn and crossbow on their back.

bat.alt: A small charcoal-brown bat banks through the moonlit mouth of a limestone cave.

couatl.alt: An iridescent feathered couatl coils in the air with broad wings spread above a misty temple clearing.

fire-elemental.alt: A towering humanoid-shaped fire elemental surges across blackened ground in a shower of embers.

fire-giant.alt: A colossal charcoal-skinned fire giant in black plate stands in a volcanic forge with a flaming sword.

gelatinous-cube.alt: A transparent gelatinous cube fills a stone corridor, with bubbles and corroded scraps suspended inside.

ghost.alt: A pale translucent ghost in tattered garments reaches forward while drifting through a moonlit ruin.

goblin-warrior.alt: A small green-skinned goblin warrior crouches on a forest path with scimitar drawn and shortbow ready.

imp.alt: A tiny red imp hovers in a dark stone alcove with leathery wings spread and barbed tail raised.

owlbear.alt: A huge brown owlbear lunges through a forest, its owl face and feathered mantle rising from a bear body.

red-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A juvenile red dragon crouches on volcanic rock, wings spread and smoke curling from its jaws.
